creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
scheidell@FreeBSD.org writes:

> Would you be willing to take maintainership of this port? it needs
> someone who can send in patches like this when needed, and
> respond to (approve, disapprove) patches sent in by others, and your
> pr's will get acted upon faster.
>
> What do you think?

No, I've only wanted to ease updating for the next person. Touching
_every_ patch in FILESDIR on _every_ update is counterproductive.
